name: Crockpot Corn & Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the boneless chicken thighs in a crockpot.
2. Add lentils, chopped onion, sliced celery, tomato paste, turmeric, cinnamon, and chicken broth to the pot.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Cook on high for 3-5 hours or cook on low for 7-9 hours until the chicken thighs are tender.
5. Remove the chicken thighs and cut into bite-sized pieces.
6. Return the meat to the pot along with the cooked corn kernels, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir well and serve hot. Makes 8 servings.
